title: Standing on Shoulders
knowledge_note: Every Muslim scholar built on those before them. Ibn Rushd built on Aristotle. You build on their work every time you write 'comes from'.
explanation: 'comes from' lets one blueprint inherit everything from another. You can then add new abilities or change existing ones.
starter_code:
blueprint Animal:
    create(name):
        me.name = name
    recipe speak():
        say me.name + " makes a sound"

blueprint Cat comes from Animal:
    create(name):
        comes_from.create(name)
    recipe speak():
        say me.name + " says: Meow!"

remember c = Cat("Whiskers")
c.speak()
worked_example:
blueprint Animal:
    create(name):
        me.name = name
    recipe speak():
        say me.name + " makes a sound"

blueprint Cat comes from Animal:
    create(name):
        comes_from.create(name)
    recipe speak():
        say me.name + " says: Meow!"

remember c = Cat("Whiskers")
c.speak()
challenge: Create a Dog blueprint that says "Woof!"
hint: Copy the Cat blueprint and change the name and "Meow!" to "Woof!"
